title: Home Screen - Both earbuds are disconnected
scenario: Verify that the Lens App correctly updates the status box and device image when both earbuds are placed in the case after being connected.
steps: Put both earbuds in the case.
expected: After step 2, the Status Box shows "Left", "Right", and "Case" fields with battery level and green indicator, and a "Status" field showing "connected" with green indicator. The device image shows left and right earbuds. After step 3, the "Left", "Right", and "Case" fields are greyed out showing only the % symbol (not the exact percentage), the "Status" field shows "disconnected" with red indicator, and the image for both earbuds is greyed out.
